zh.lifeSummary: 當Jean Brienne de Beaumont Vicomte de Beaumont於1265年出生在巴勒斯坦耶路撒冷時，他的父親Louis de BRIENNE46歲，母親Agnès de BEAUMONT31歲。他於1265年9月26日之後與Alice d'Oyry結婚。他去世於1306年6月20日在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯普-德-o可勒爾蒙吉福藍德享年41歲，埋葬在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易薩特艾迪瓦爾-利斯勒 曼斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Beaumont
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Gilles, Gaetan, Honore, Jacques, Jean-Guy, Marcel.

English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of the five places in Normandy or several others elsewhere in France so named. The placename comes from Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’ + mont ‘hill’. There are also places in England so named under Norman influence in Cumberland, Lancashire, and Essex, the last of which changed its name in the 12th century from Fulepet ‘foul pit’ to Bealmont ‘beautiful hill’; these may also have given rise to the surname. The surname is now widespread throughout England, but most common in Yorkshire. Compare Belmont .

History: Many English bearers of this surname are descended from Henry de Beaumont (died 1340), who came to England from France as a soldier, serving Kings Edward I, II, and III of England. He acquired the earldom of Buchan in Scotland by marriage. — Many American bearers of this surname are descendants of John Beaumont (1612–47), who came to North America from England in 1630. William Beaumont came from England to Cambridge MA in 1635 and subsequently moved to CT.

variants.name: Bement
meanings: English (Cambridgeshire): variant of   Beaumont  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Beeman
meanings: English (Kent): occupational name for a beekeeper, from Middle English bee-man ‘bee-keeper’ (Old English bēo + mann).
English (Kent): variant of   Beaumont  .
Americanized form of German Biemann or of its Dutch cognate Bieman.

variants.name: Belmont
meanings: French and English (of Norman origin): variant of   Beaumont  .
Catalan: habitational name from the placename Bellmont ‘beautiful mountain’. Compare Spanish   Belmonte  .

variants.name: Baumunk
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Siegmund.
German: probably a Germanized form of a French Huguenot name Beaumont (see also Beaumont ).

variants.name: Bayman
meanings: English (mainly Lancashire): variant of   Beaumont  .
Americanized form of German Beumann or Bäumann, variants of Baumann .

nameMeanings.name: Jean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Like Jane and Joan , a medieval variant of Old French Je(h)anne. Towards the end of the Middle Ages this form became largely confined to Scotland. In the 20th century it became more widely used in the English-speaking world and enjoyed a period of great popularity, but it is now out of fashion. Among numerous well-known and influential bearers are the British novelists Jean Plaidy ( Eleanor Hibbert , 1910–93 ) and Jean Rhys ( Ella Gwendolen Rees Williams , 1894–1979 ), British actress Jean Simmons ( 1929–2010 ), and American-born actress Jean Seberg ( 1938–79 ). It is also found as a variant spelling of the masculine name Gene .

variants.name: John
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: Jeane
meanings: Variant spelling of   Jean .

en.lifeSummary: When Jean Brienne de Beaumont Vicomte de Beaumont was born in 1265, in Jerusalem, Palestine, his father, Louis de BRIENNE, was 46 and his mother, Agnès de BEAUMONT, was 31. He married Alice d'Oyry after 26 September 1265. He died on 20 June 1306, in Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, at the age of 41, and was buried in Étival-lès-Le Mans, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jean Brienne de Beaumont Vicomte de Beaumont est né en 1265, à Jerusalem, Palestine, son père, Louis de BRIENNE, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Agnès de BEAUMONT, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Alice d'Oyry après 26 septembre 1265. Il est décédé le 20 juin 1306, à Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, à l’âge de 41 ans, et a été enterré à Étival-lès-Le Mans, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jean Brienne de Beaumont Vicomte de Beaumont 1265 in Jerusalem, Palästina geboren wurde, war sein Vater Louis de BRIENNE 46 und seine Mutter Agnès de BEAUMONT 31. Er hat nach 26. September 1265 Alice d'Oyry geheiratet. Er starb am 20. Juni 1306 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich und wurde in Étival-lès-Le Mans, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jean Brienne de Beaumont Vicomte de Beaumont è nato il nel 1265 nel Jerusalem, Palestina, il suo padre, Louis de BRIENNE, aveva 46 anni e il suo madre, Agnès de BEAUMONT, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Alice d'Oyry dopo il 26 settembre 1265. Morì il 20 giugno 1306, nel Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, all'età di 41 anni, e fu sepolto a Étival-lès-Le Mans, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Jean Brienne de Beaumont Vicomte de Beaumontが1265年にパレスチナジャーウサレムで生まれた時，父Louis de BRIENNEは46歳，母Agnès de BEAUMONTは31歳であった。1265年9月26日以後にAlice d'Oyryと結婚した。彼は1306年6月20日にフランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスプウイ-デ-ドoメクラーモント-フエランドで41歳で死去し，フランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーサルスeティヴァル-ルeス-ル マンスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Jean Brienne de Beaumont Vicomte de Beaumont(이)가 1265년 팔레스타인 제루사렘에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Louis de BRIENNE(은)는 46세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnès de BEAUMONT(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1265년 9월 26일 이후 Alice d'Oyry(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1306년 6월 20일 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 푸이-데-드o 클레몽-페랜드에서 41세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 사르테 e티발-e스-일 먼스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jean Brienne de Beaumont Vicomte de Beaumont nasceu em 1265, em Jerusalem, Palestina, seu pai, Louis de BRIENNE, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Agnès de BEAUMONT, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice d'Oyry após 26 de setembro de 1265. Ele faleceu em 20 de junho de 1306, em Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França, com 41 anos, e foi sepultado em Étival-lès-Le Mans, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jean Brienne de Beaumont Vicomte de Beaumont родился в 1265 г. в местности джирсеилем, Палестина, его отцу по имени Louis de BRIENNE было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnès de BEAUMONT, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice d'Oyry после 26 сентябрь 1265 г. Он умер 20 июня 1306 г. в местности клирмонт-фирранд, пуи-де-дoм, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция в возрасте 41 год и был похоронен в местности eтивал-лeс-л манс, сарт, пеис де ла лоир, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jean Brienne de Beaumont Vicomte de Beaumont nació en 1265, en Jerusalem, Palestina, su papá, Louis de BRIENNE, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Agnès de BEAUMONT, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Alice d'Oyry después de 26 de septiembre de 1265. Murió el 20 de junio de 1306, en Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, a la edad de 41 años, y fue sepultado en Étival-lès-Le Mans, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, Francia.
